name: SPC Nickel Corp.
summary: SPC Nickel Corp. engages in the exploration of nickel, copper, and platinum group metals in the Sudbury region. The company owns Aer-Kidd Property located on the Worthington Offset Dyke in the Sudbury mining district; and Lockerby East and West Graham exploration properties located in the Sudbury district. It also holds an option agreement to acquire a 100% interest in the Janes property that covers an area of approximately 2,900 hectares located in northeast Sudbury. The company was formerly known as Sudbury Platinum Corporation and changed its name to SPC Nickel Corp. in December 2020. SPC Nickel Corp. was incorporated in 2013 and is based in Sudbury, Canada.
